title: Dynamic Trees: Universal Compat
description: Adds broad compatibility between Dynamic Trees and modded wood types. Automatically detects trees, registers species, and integrates growth systems. Built as a scalable framework to support many mods without requiring individual compat patches.
body:
### **ALPHA BUILD STILL IN DEV**
This mod adds compatibility between Dynamic Trees and modded trees.

It detects wood types from other mods and registers them as Dynamic Trees with proper species, growth, and behavior.

The goal is to avoid making separate compat addons for every mod by providing a single system that can handle many trees in a consistent way.

The mod is designed to be scalable and modular, so more compat can be added over time without rewriting everything.

World generation and advanced integration will be expanded progressively.
